Workshop.Title: DeviceOfHermes
Workshop.Description:
The modding tool by Hermes.
A first time on loaded, A Mod using DeviceOfHermes throws TypeInitializationException sometimes. This error is normal spec on DeviceOfHermes.
By start game with ignoring the errors then DeviceOfHermes modifies load order since it needs first-load than other mods. From after that on game will loads correct orders.
最初のロード時にTypeInitializationExceptionが発生する場合がありますが、これは正常な仕様です。 エラーを無視し、タイトル画面へ進むことでそれ以降エラーが発生しなくなります。
